data.comment: My favorite web3 street artist! Great friend too!
data.metadata: {"description":""}

translation.translatedContent: My favorite web3 street artist! Great friend too!

data.metadata: {"description":"Pavil has relentless conviction in the things he does. Whether IRL or online, he puts his best effort and pushes to have a good impact on his surroundings. Amazing friend!"}

translation.translatedDescription: Pavil has relentless conviction in the things he does. Whether IRL or online, he puts his best effort and pushes to have a good impact on his surroundings. Amazing friend!

data.metadata:
{"description":"Lola is a top Abstract streamer and an amazing artist. She always brings great vibes, and her smile is contagious. Always kind and positive, she also introduces her community to Web3 and Abstract through games, dApps, and her streams.

Recently reaching giga status, she has become one of the faces of the chain over the past few months. Consistent and reliable, she is fully committed and truly reflects the values of the chain.

If you’re not following her yet… there’s still time 
Sigan a mi parcerita, es una chimba 🔥"}

translation.translatedDescription:
Lola is a top Abstract streamer and an amazing artist. She always brings great vibes, and her smile is contagious. Always kind and positive, she also introduces her community to Web3 and Abstract through games, dApps, and her streams.

Recently reaching giga status, she has become one of the faces of the chain over the past few months. Consistent and reliable, she is fully committed and truly reflects the values of the chain.

If you’re not following her yet… there’s still time 
Follow my friend, she's awesome 🔥

data.metadata: {"description":"For me, he is the grain of sand that set the entire abstract hourglass in motion on Ethos. At the origin of the Giga wave, he played a key role in the massive arrival of hundreds and by extension thousands of users on Ethos. He also educated all of us tremendously at this level. Guezito is the kind of person who doesn’t make much noise but never stops working. A true example."}

translation.translatedDescription: For me, he is the grain of sand that set the entire abstract hourglass in motion on Ethos. At the origin of the Giga wave, he played a key role in the massive arrival of hundreds and by extension thousands of users on Ethos. He also educated all of us tremendously at this level. Guezito is the kind of person who doesn’t make much noise but never stops working. A true example.

data.metadata: {"description":"Guys, show my even one person who can't say that Berko isn't GOAT. Absolutely legendary person: supportive, friendly, positive, honest. Discord beast too he he he. Brooo, yea, i can call you bro, hope that in 2026 we are going to meet each other on any IRL event. Hugs and shake your hand."}

{"description":"Previously i left positive review to Kang and a bit later made decision about vouch to him. 

Kang super helpful and hardworking person, which is spreading word about Abstract in his region. Their local community (Korean) growing up because of such persons. 

He is spreading word about all updates, alphas, features, trying to onboard new users, IRL events. 

And yea, he is a Pudgy! Happy to vouch for you mate! Happy to connect with you."}

{"description":"Abschud is the ultimate representation of being part of Abstract. One of the core team members, especially together with Sauci, is always active and supportive. He supported my growth on X, just as he has for countless others. Truly a legend."}

data.comment: Pavil, the Pudgy Artist of the Streets
data.metadata:
{"description":"I first got to know Pavil at Pudgy Asia. With 8,888 Pudgy Penguins out there, it’s not always easy for us to know everyone!

However, i recognized him instantly because i had seen so much of his spray painted wall art before. he is truly like a modern day bard. he brightens up the streets by filling ordinary walls with murals of Igloo, Abstract, Pudgy, and more.

I believe the secret behind his vibrant art lies in his physical health. Pavil constantly trains with triathlons to maintain a healthy body. socrates’ famous quote, "sound mind in a sound body", describes him perfectly.

By the way, why can’t I attach photos on the Ethos project? You really need to see the Bearish, Fugz, Abstrer, and Pudgy drawings he painstakingly created stroke by stroke

My personal wish is that he visits Korea someday to paint a mural here. He is an artist friend I really look forward to getting to know better!

Love you, Pudgy Fam Pavil!"}

translation.translatedContent: Pavil, the Pudgy Artist of the Streets
translation.translatedDescription:
I first got to know Pavil at Pudgy Asia. With 8,888 Pudgy Penguins out there, it’s not always easy for us to know everyone!

However, i recognized him instantly because i had seen so much of his spray painted wall art before. he is truly like a modern day bard. he brightens up the streets by filling ordinary walls with murals of Igloo, Abstract, Pudgy, and more.

I believe the secret behind his vibrant art lies in his physical health. Pavil constantly trains with triathlons to maintain a healthy body. socrates’ famous quote, "sound mind in a sound body", describes him perfectly.

By the way, why can’t I attach photos on the Ethos project? You really need to see the Bearish, Fugz, Abstrer, and Pudgy drawings he painstakingly created stroke by stroke

My personal wish is that he visits Korea someday to paint a mural here. He is an artist friend I really look forward to getting to know better!

Love you, Pudgy Fam Pavil!

data.metadata: {"description":"It's neither duty or reward that drives him, but passion. Never asking nothing in return ! Our ecosystem really need more ppl like Guezito :)"}

translation.translatedDescription: It's neither duty or reward that drives him, but passion. Never asking nothing in return ! Our ecosystem really need more ppl like Guezito :)

Pavil is a fellow Giga Chad on Abstract ecosystem whose art is what caught everyone's eye. 

He creates the most epic street art with web3 culture embedded in them. 

Seems like a good and helpful person in general as well. Top giga chad material for sure.

data.metadata: {"description":"Cristian leads with love and positivity. His presence makes you feel warm and welcome in any community he is a part of. I had the great pleasure of meeting him in person at NFT NYC, and that only reinforced what I felt online. He is a gifted content creator who is able to pivot seamlessly from providing thoughtful analysis to contagious laughter. I know he's someone I'll vibe with for many years to come. I've recently learned more about his expertise beyond crypto, and it only deepened my respect for him. Bonus Fact: Cristian is a pro Twerker!"}

translation.translatedDescription: Cristian leads with love and positivity. His presence makes you feel warm and welcome in any community he is a part of. I had the great pleasure of meeting him in person at NFT NYC, and that only reinforced what I felt online. He is a gifted content creator who is able to pivot seamlessly from providing thoughtful analysis to contagious laughter. I know he's someone I'll vibe with for many years to come. I've recently learned more about his expertise beyond crypto, and it only deepened my respect for him. Bonus Fact: Cristian is a pro Twerker!

data.comment: Day 1 supporter and believer on Abstract

translation.translatedContent: Day 1 supporter and believer on Abstract
translation.translatedDescription:
Papasmooth is one of a very few who has been here with us since day 1 when abstract is only the concept transitioning from testnet to mainnet

I could personally say that he truly deserves gigachad where he continues to spread positive and supportive energy 

I wish you the best brother

data.metadata: {"description":"Très présent au sein du discord Abstract, également sur X, Marvin est une personne impliqué au sein d'Abstract. Il suit la majorité des actualités en rapport avec Abstract, utilises la majorité des dApps de l'ecosystème et participe à la vie de communauté. \n\nUn véritable Gigachad !"}

translation.translatedDescription:
Very present within the Abstract Discord, also on X, Marvin is a person involved within Abstract. He follows the majority of news related to Abstract, uses the majority of the ecosystem's dApps, and participates in community life.

A true Gigachad!

data.metadata: {"description":"Je le vois partout, en plus d'être un Gigachad sur Abstract, il est très engagé au sein de la communauté crypto dans son ensemble. Il est très impliqué également au sein du Smol Talk, qui est un Space journalier Français, qui traite de divers sujets d'actualités crypto."}

translation.translatedDescription: I see him everywhere, in addition to being a Gigachad on Abstract, he is very engaged within the crypto community as a whole. He is also very involved in Smol Talk, which is a daily French Space that deals with various crypto news topics.

data.comment: A Gigachad present within the Abstract ecosystem

translation.translatedContent: A Gigachad present within the Abstract ecosystem
translation.translatedDescription:
Aliru is very present within the Abstract ecosystem, he is an active Gigachad, often there to help the community.

He brings his touch of freshness and originality.

I appreciate him for his authenticity.

data.metadata: {"description":"Already reviewed to my Giga chad frien, decided to vouch for him! Always supportive and friendly!"}

translation.translatedDescription: Already reviewed to my Giga chad friend, decided to vouch for him! Always supportive and friendly!

I first met AL through Abstract, and we’ve talked a bunch on X since then always vibing, always supporting each other in the Abstract community. AL is honestly one of the most dedicated Giga Chads I’ve met. His love for Abstract and Penguins is on another level.

He’s always dropping quality, positive content about Abstract and Pudgy Penguins on X. If you’re new to either community, AL is 100% someone you should follow and learn from.

Keep being a legend and spreading that good energy, AL.

data.metadata: {"description":"Silly est un gigachad d'abstract trés apprécié de la communauté.\nPour ma part j'apprecie son support constant, il n'hesite jamais à laisser un mot sympa et ses feedbacks sont toujours trés pertinents.\nJ'aime beaucoup les recap d'informations qu'il fait sur Abstract, cela nous permet à tous de ne pas louper les essentiels de la semaine."}

translation.translatedDescription:
Silly is a gigachad of Abstract who is highly appreciated by the community.
Personally, I appreciate his constant support, he never hesitates to leave a nice word, and his feedback is always very relevant.
I really like the information recaps he does on Abstract, it allows all of us not to miss the essentials of the week.

data.metadata: {"description":"MIC and I first crossed paths on Abstract through a handful of shared projects, but it wasn’t until we connected more deeply in Moonbirds that I realized just how much he elevates a community. He shows up with positivity, insight, and a genuine desire to help the people around him grow. His involvement in the Solana ecosystem even inspired me to revisit trading platforms. MIC has given me confidence that the right tools can truly elevate my trading approach, rather than relying solely on raw ability. I’m grateful our paths keep crossing, and I’m excited to continue building alongside him."}

translation.translatedDescription: MIC and I first crossed paths on Abstract through a handful of shared projects, but it wasn’t until we connected more deeply in Moonbirds that I realized just how much he elevates a community. He shows up with positivity, insight, and a genuine desire to help the people around him grow. His involvement in the Solana ecosystem even inspired me to revisit trading platforms. MIC has given me confidence that the right tools can truly elevate my trading approach, rather than relying solely on raw ability. I’m grateful our paths keep crossing, and I’m excited to continue building alongside him.

data.author: 0x6500555EEAAA4A0f040c558Ec0282c342daa5259
data.subject: 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000
data.comment: Abstract의 교육자이자 한 가정 아버지, Nat
data.metadata:
{
  "description": "Nat은 Abstract가 탄생하기 훨씬 전부터 Pudgy Penguins의 커뮤니티의 일원이었습니다.

Nat은 2021 부인에게 Pudgy Penguins NFT를 선물했고, 2022년 펏지 펭귄 태국 커뮤니티를 만들었으며, 2023년 펏지펭귄 MVP를 수상했어요. 이것만 보더라도 펏지펭귄 OG 중의 OG입니다.(증거는 그의 지갑에 있는 SBT를 확인하면 고개를 끄덕일 겁니다.)

이제 Abstract 이야기를 해보죠. 2024년 Abstract의 탄생과 동시에 태국 커뮤니티를 창설하고 기가채드들을 선별하는 역할을 했습니다(저도 그에게 발탁되어 Giga Chad가 된 것 같아요).

꾸준히 자신의 국가인 태국에서 세미나를 열어 사람들에게 지식을 나눠 주고, 실제로 밋업을 주최하며 적극적으로 사람들과 교류해서 생태계에 기여합니다. 그리고 Abstract 과련 AMA, Space, Live Stream 등 도 적극적으로 주최 하는데... 제가 캐치하지 못한 활동 범위를 가지고 있어요.

요즘은 Abstract에서 APAC 지역에 집중 마케팅을 펼치고 있는데 적극적인 지원을 하고 있습니다. Abstract Korea Guild 속칭 AKG를 만들어 한국 사람들을 열심히 결집시키고 앱스트랙트의 Dapp 게임들을 많이 소개합니다.

Nat은 에너자이저인가 봐요... 절대 안 지칩니다. 이러한 공로를 인정받아 2026년 지금 Abstract의 정식 팀원으로 합류했어요.

가끔씩 Nat의 피드에 가족 사진을 올리는데 자식과 함께 정말 행복해 보여요. 저도 이런 가정을 이루고 싶습니다. 실제로 KBW 2025 당시 Abstract 관련 행사에서 많이 만났고, 아주 나이스한 친구입니다."
}

translation.translatedContent: Nat, an educator at Abstract and a father
translation.translatedDescription:
Nat has been a part of the Pudgy Penguins community since long before Abstract was even born.

Nat gifted his wife a Pudgy Penguins NFT in 2021, created the Pudgy Penguins Thailand community in 2022, and won the Pudgy Penguins MVP in 2023. Just from this, you can tell he's an OG among OGs. (If you check the SBT in his wallet, you'll nod in agreement.)

Now, let's talk about Abstract. With the birth of Abstract in 2024, he founded the Thai community and played a role in selecting the Giga Chads (I think I was selected by him to become a Giga Chad).

He consistently holds seminars in his country, Thailand, to share knowledge with people, actively hosts meetups, and contributes to the ecosystem by actively interacting with people. He also actively hosts Abstract-related AMAs, Spaces, Live Streams, etc... He has a range of activities that I haven't even caught.

These days, Abstract is focusing on marketing in the APAC region, and he is actively supporting it. He created Abstract Korea Guild, also known as AKG, to diligently unite Koreans and introduce many of Abstract's Dapp games.

Nat must be an Energizer bunny... he never gets tired. In recognition of these contributions, he officially joined the Abstract team in 2026.

Occasionally, Nat posts family photos on his feed, and he looks really happy with his children. I want to build a family like that too. I actually met him a lot at Abstract-related events during KBW 2025, and he's a very nice guy.

data.author: 0x637adB3D0DdbB9088d99455F8c2b522C889B7347
data.subject: 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000

translation.translatedDescription: Pavil is well known in the pudgy community for drawing great murals of cultural events and projects like the Gigachads and OnChainHeroes

data.author: 0x6500555EEAAA4A0f040c558Ec0282c342daa5259
data.subject: 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000
data.metadata:
{
  "description": "퍼지 펭귄 우크라이나를 이끄는 동시에 Abstract의 Giga Chad입니다. 적극적으로 커뮤니티를 이끌며 팟캐스트, 음악, 스페이스, 밈 등으로 양질의 정보를 알려주고 분위기를 띄웁니다.

그리고 이 친구 남자가 봐도 상당히 잘생겼어요.

제가 MAXIMUS의 콘텐츠 중 가장 기억나는 3가지가 있어요.

첫 번째

Pudgy Penguins와 BE@RBRICK의 콜라보레이션 장난감 언박싱 영상입니다. 처음부터 씰을 뜯고 개봉해서 실제 어느 정도 크기인지, 어떻게 생겼는지 자랑하는 콘텐츠였는데 이건 나도 가지고 싶다는 생각이 들었습니다.
(https://x.com/maximusss/status/2003798322793025617?)

두 번째

Abstract 1주년 기념으로 랩을 작사·작곡 후 직접 불렀는데 Abstract에 대해 진정성 있는 애정이 있구나 하는 생각이 들었어요. 재미있는 점은 Abstract의 메인넷을 출시했을 때도 랩을 직접 작사·작곡 후 불렀더라고요? 한번 들어 보는 것을 추천합니다.
(https://x.com/maximusss/status/2014684572437422121)

세 번째

이글루의 창립자 Luca Netz와의 팟캐스트인데 PENGU ETF 현황이 어떻게 흘러가고, 정부에 로비를 어떻게 하고 있는지, 지금 진행하고 있는 파트너십, NFT의 가치를 어떤 방식으로 키워 나가고 싶고, 2026년부터는 제품의 품질을 올리는 전략까지 상당히 많은 Alpha 정보를 들을 수 있어서 많이 좋은 시간이었습니다.
(https://x.com/maximusss/status/1999164007647969755)

Giga Chad들을 유심히 지켜보면 상당히 각자의 분야에서 다양한 재주를 가지고 있는데 적재적소에 Abstract에 쓰이고 있는 것 같아서 생태계에 있는 저로서는 매우 기분이 좋았습니다.

MAXIMUS의 피드를 꼭 둘러보시길... 최근에는 유튜브도 개설 했습니다."
}

translation.translatedDescription:
He leads Pudgy Penguins Ukraine and is also Abstract's Giga Chad. He actively leads the community, providing quality information and boosting the atmosphere through podcasts, music, Spaces, memes, and more.

And this guy is quite handsome, even from a man's perspective.

Here are the three things I remember most from MAXIMUS's content:

First

A video of unboxing the Pudgy Penguins and BE@RBRICK collaboration toy. It was content that showed off the actual size and appearance by tearing the seal and opening it from the beginning, and it made me want to have it too.
(https://x.com/maximusss/status/2003798322793025617?)

Second

He wrote, composed, and sang a rap to commemorate Abstract's 1st anniversary, which made me think he had a genuine affection for Abstract. Interestingly, he also wrote, composed, and sang a rap when Abstract's mainnet was released? I recommend giving it a listen.
(https://x.com/maximusss/status/2014684572437422121)

Third

A podcast with Igloo's founder, Luca Netz, where I was able to hear a lot of Alpha information, such as how the PENGU ETF is progressing, how they are lobbying the government, the partnerships they are currently pursuing, how they want to increase the value of NFTs, and even the strategy to improve product quality from 2026. It was a very good time.
(https://x.com/maximusss/status/1999164007647969755)

If you look closely at the Giga Chads, they have quite a variety of talents in their respective fields, and it seems like they are being used appropriately in Abstract, which makes me, as someone in the ecosystem, feel very good.

Be sure to check out MAXIMUS's feed... He recently opened a YouTube channel as well.

data.author: 0x2Ba7586e93E256ECdE946DfFa5847447474f08E3
data.subject: 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000
data.metadata:
{
  "description": "First off, huge respect to one of the most proactive contributors in the Abstract ecosystem.

Kang is hands down the most enthusiastic international friend I've met in crypto. I’ve never had anyone support me like this before.

Why he stands out:

High Agency: He never waits for instructions. If he sees a gap, he fills it himself. As a Diamond Tier user, he actually uses the tools we build. His feedback on Abslysis has been invaluable for tracking the ecosystem's health.

A Builder’s Ally: As devs, we often stay behind the scenes and can easily be overlooked. But ever since I met Kang, he has championed my work non-stop, offering massive support and encouragement to keep me going.

Humble Giga Chad: Despite grinding massive XP weekly and holding high status, he never looks down on anyone. He is generous, approachable, and helps everyone in the community with patience.

He bridges the KR, CN, and Global communities effortlessly while keeping the "WAGMI" energy high as a Mod for AbstractKorea.

If you want the real pulse of the Abstract ecosystem, watching his moves is your best Alpha. A true holder and a developer's best friend. 💎🐧",
  "source": "Ethos Everywhere Wallet",
  "version": "1.0",
  "client": "web"
}

translation.translatedDescription:
First off, huge respect to one of the most proactive contributors in the Abstract ecosystem.

Kang is hands down the most enthusiastic international friend I've met in crypto. I’ve never had anyone support me like this before.

Why he stands out:

High Agency: He never waits for instructions. If he sees a gap, he fills it himself. As a Diamond Tier user, he actually uses the tools we build. His feedback on Abslysis has been invaluable for tracking the ecosystem's health.

A Builder’s Ally: As devs, we often stay behind the scenes and can easily be overlooked. But ever since I met Kang, he has championed my work non-stop, offering massive support and encouragement to keep me going.

Humble Giga Chad: Despite grinding massive XP weekly and holding high status, he never looks down on anyone. He is generous, approachable, and helps everyone in the community with patience.

He bridges the KR, CN, and Global communities effortlessly while keeping the "WAGMI" energy high as a Mod for AbstractKorea.

If you want the real pulse of the Abstract ecosystem, watching his moves is your best Alpha. A true holder and a developer's best friend. 💎🐧

data.author: 0x4d2b8676f52575354140436BD55b8E61F448D8a7
data.subject: 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000
data.metadata:
{
  "description": "처음 그를 알게 된 것은 ABSLYSIS 통계 사이트를 보다가 이것을 개발한 사람이 dalaoge인 걸 알았을 때였습니다.

ABSLYSIS 사이트는 Abstract를 하는 사람이면 궁금해할 만한 통계를 제공해 주는데 Tier 분포도, 배지 보유자 현황, X 배너 모음 등등 다양한 정보를 제공해 준답니다.

사람들이 저에게 "너는 어떻게 그걸 아는 거야?"라고 했을 때... 사람들이 생각보다 많이 몰라서 저는 이 사이트를 소개한 기억이 납니다. 실제로 많은 Abstract 유저들에게 호응도 얻었죠. 이런 좋은 정보는 많은 사람들이 알아야 한다고 생각합니다.

그리고 그 당시 ABSLYSIS에는 X를 장식할 배너가 없어서 제가 몇십 개를 만들어서 줬는데 dalaoge가 빠르게 업데이트해서 지금은 많이 풍족해졌어요! Abstract中文游戏公会의 계정 배너도 제가 만든 것을 사용하니 저도 보람을 느껴요.

dalaoge는 제가 도와준 걸 보고, 중국 커뮤니티 분들이 많이 쓰는 채팅 어플 WeChat으로 초대해 줬어요. 많이 감동받았습니다.

가만 보면 중국 분들은 능력자분들이 진짜 많아서 실제로 기가버스 게임을 할 때도 도움을 많이 받았네요.

재미있는 사실 : dalaoge는 나와 함께 Abstract의 Giga Chad에 승급한 동기이다.",
  "source": "Ethos Everywhere Wallet",
  "version": "1.0",
  "client": "web"
}

translation.translatedDescription:
I first learned about him when I was browsing the ABSLYSIS statistics site and realized that dalaoge was the one who developed it.

The ABSLYSIS site provides statistics that anyone doing Abstract would be curious about, including Tier distribution, badge holder status, X banner collections, and more.

When people asked me, "How do you know that?"... I remember introducing this site because many people didn't know about it. It actually received a lot of positive responses from Abstract users. I think many people should know about this good information.

And at the time, ABSLYSIS didn't have any banners to decorate X, so I made dozens and gave them to dalaoge, who quickly updated them, and now there are plenty! I also feel proud that the Abstract中文游戏公会's account banner uses the one I made.

Dalaoge saw that I helped him and invited me to WeChat, a chat app that many people in the Chinese community use. I was very touched.

Looking at it, there are so many talented people in China, and I actually received a lot of help when playing Gigabverse games.

Fun fact: dalaoge is a peer who was promoted to Giga Chad in Abstract with me.

data.author: 0xE1F3ef504b0C24aA4F790D26d6EA451b40a0c863
data.subject: 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000

translation.translatedDescription: KangBokSoon has been very supportive of me.  Every interaction we have is always pleasant.  KangBokSoon even has given me lots of support by having him and his friends join my Telegram channel.

data.author: 0x6500555EEAAA4A0f040c558Ec0282c342daa5259
data.subject: 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000
data.metadata:
{
  "description": "Rubiks는 Abstract 초창기 나의 우상이었습니다. Abstract Portal 초반에는 Dapp이 많이 없어서 XP를 얻는 게 정말 힘들었는데... 이 사람은 압도적으로 많이 얻었어요.

당시 $PENGU와 $ABSTER를 정말 많이 보유했는데 그래서 XP를 많이 받았던 거 같아요.

X에 매일매일 위 두 코인을 쉴링했고, 지금까지도 차트를 그리며 "펭구, 앱스터 가즈아!"를 외치고 있습니다. Rubiks는 말만 하는 게 아니고 $ABSTER를 최고점에서도 팔지 않고, 지금까지 코인을 가지고 있는 것으로 기억합니다.

최근 Abstract의 DeFi 코인 $ABX 또한 살펴보고 조금씩 매수하고 있습니다.

또한 개인 텔레그램도 운영하고 있어요. 여기에는 Abstract뿐만 아니라 다양한 알파 정보들이 있습니다. 대표적으로 Solana 계열의 Meme 코인 $KNET, $M0N3Y, $TROLL 등 메가 히트를 달성한 코인을 발굴한 전적이 있어요. 덕분에 저도 소액 매수하여 이득을 봤습니다.

실제로 얼굴도 공개해서 신뢰감이 있다고 생각합니다. 젊은 친구인데 능력 있는 게 대단해요."
}

translation.translatedContent: Guardian of Pengu and Abster, Rubiks
translation.translatedDescription:
Rubiks was my idol from the early days of Abstract. In the early days of Abstract Portal, it was really hard to earn XP because there weren't many Dapps... but this person earned an overwhelming amount.

I think he received a lot of XP because he held a lot of $PENGU and $ABSTER at the time.

He shilled the above two coins on X every day, and even now, he's still drawing charts and shouting, "Pengu, Abster, let's go to the moon!" Rubiks doesn't just talk; I remember that he didn't sell $ABSTER even at its peak and still holds the coins.

Recently, he's also been looking into Abstract's DeFi coin, $ABX, and buying it little by little.

He also runs a personal Telegram channel. It contains not only Abstract information but also various alpha insights. For example, he has a track record of discovering mega-hit coins in the Solana ecosystem, such as Meme coins $KNET, $M0N3Y, and $TROLL. Thanks to him, I also made a profit by buying a small amount.

I think he's trustworthy because he actually reveals his face. He's a young guy, but it's amazing how capable he is.

data.author: 0x6500555EEAAA4A0f040c558Ec0282c342daa5259
data.subject: 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000
data.metadata:
{
  "description": "Sauciii는 매일매일 Abstract, Pudgy 커뮤니티를 돌며 생태계 홍보, 커뮤니티 멤버 소개, 앱스트랙트에 대한 무한 쉴링을 하는 친구입니다. 이게 X(트위터) 플랫폼에서만 하면 그냥 그런가 보다 하겠는데, 한국의 모든 앱스트랙트 멤버 방에 들어가 외국인인데도 한글로 "좋은 아침, 밥 먹었어?" 등등의 언어를 구사하며 세심하게 생태계를 살핍니다.

짬 많이 먹은 원사 계급의 군인을 보는 거 같아요. ㅋㅋㅋ

저처럼 온라인에서만 활동하는 게 아니고, 오프라인에서까지 열심히 하는 친구인데.. 지난 2025 KBW 'One Earth Firework Event' 행사를 NFT 갤러리 위플에서 했을 때 직접 만난 적이 있어요. 한국어가 유창하지 않았지만 사진 찍어 달라고 하니까 사진도 찍어주고, 헤매는 사람들을 땀을 뻘뻘 흘리면서 열심히 도와줬던 기억이 있습니다. 정말 좋아 보였어요.

개인적으로 DM을 보내서 Abstract 관련 이런저런 이야기를 할 때 자세하게 들어줘서 너무 고맙게 생각하고 있습니다. 저도 본받아서 열심히 해야겠어요.

(처음 만났을 때 UFC 선수인 매랍 드발리쉬인 줄 알고 공손해진 기억이 납니다.)"
}

translation.translatedDescription:
Sauciii is a friend who roams the Abstract and Pudgy communities every day, promoting the ecosystem, introducing community members, and endlessly shilling Abstract. If this was only on the X (Twitter) platform, it would be just another thing, but he goes into all the Abstract member rooms in Korea, and even though he's a foreigner, he uses Korean to say things like "Good morning, have you eaten?" and meticulously takes care of the ecosystem.

It's like watching a seasoned warrant officer in the military. lol

He's not just active online like me, but also works hard offline. I met him in person at the 'One Earth Firework Event' during the 2025 KBW, which was held at the NFT gallery Weeple. Although his Korean wasn't fluent, he took pictures when I asked him to, and I remember him sweating profusely while helping people who were lost. He seemed really great.

I'm personally grateful that he listens in detail when I send him DMs to talk about Abstract-related things. I should learn from him and work hard too.

(I remember being polite when I first met him because I thought he was UFC fighter Merab Dvalishvili.)

translation.translatedDescription: Pavil is a true artist! His passion and character shine through on abstract. The dedication to sharing his journey through clipits of the process have been eye opening in discovering the processes. I hope he continues to share with the abstract community. A True giga chad!

data.author: 0x4d2b8676f52575354140436BD55b8E61F448D8a7
data.subject: 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000
data.metadata:
{
  "description": "skarly는 단순 기획자를 넘어 10년 이상의 시스템 설계 경력과 Wolf Game 리드 엔지니어로서의 실무 데이터가 증명된 1티어 개발자입니다.

24년 12월 펏지펭귄의 초대박 에어드랍으로 앱스트랙트의 기대치가 한껏 높아진 시점에 Abstract 체인에 OCH가 출시 했었죠... 그 당시 앱스트랙트 기반 NFT들이 힘을 못 쓰고 죽 쑤는 경우가 많았는데, OCH가 그 징크스를 제대로 깨버리고 분위기를 반전 시킨 기억이 아직도 생생합니다.

OnChain Heroes가 흥미로웠던 점은 재미 보다는 온체인 기반의 Risk to Earn 모델을 통해 유저의 투기적 욕구와 리스크 관리를 유도했고, 가챠 존과 무기 NFT를 활용한 소각 시스템은 인플레이션을 억제하려는 노력으로 나름 훌륭한 설계를 보여 줬다고 생각 합니다!($HERO 토큰도 생태계의 한 부분 이고요.)

지금은 앱스트랙트에 다양한 Dapp이 들어와서 활발해 졌지만 OnChain Heroes가 이런 초석을 깔아주지 않았다면 눈앞이 깜깜하네요...

최근들어 제가 운영하는 텔레그램 방에서도 테스트 버젼을 뿌리면서 직접뛰는 창립자라 더 믿음이 갑니다.

그리고 skarly가 한국인 이더라구요? 어쩐지 한글버젼 패치를 잘 해뒀더라니.. 저도 최근에 OCH NFT를 구매 했습니다. 새로운 시즌이 열리면 달려 봐야겠어요!",
  "source": "Ethos Everywhere Wallet",
  "version": "1.0",
  "client": "web"
}

translation.translatedDescription:
Skarly is more than just a planner; he is a top-tier developer proven by over 10 years of system design experience and practical data as the Lead Engineer of Wolf Game.

In December 2024, when expectations for Abstract were heightened due to Pudgy Penguins' mega airdrop, OCH was launched on the Abstract chain... At that time, many Abstract-based NFTs struggled and underperformed, but I vividly remember OCH breaking that jinx and reversing the atmosphere.

What was interesting about OnChain Heroes was that, rather than focusing on fun, it induced users' speculative desires and risk management through an on-chain-based Risk to Earn model. The incineration system using gacha zones and weapon NFTs showed a reasonably excellent design to suppress inflation! (The $HERO token is also part of the ecosystem.)

Now, various Dapps have entered Abstract and become active, but if OnChain Heroes hadn't laid this foundation, the future would be bleak...

Recently, I've been distributing test versions in the Telegram room I run, and I have more faith in the founder who is directly involved.

And it turns out skarly is Korean? No wonder he patched the Korean version so well. I also recently purchased an OCH NFT. I'll have to jump in when the new season opens!

data.author: 0x8188E27a4E359f2aa7ed3f41495a8816f35917D9
data.subject: 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000

translation.translatedDescription: Giga Chad energy, reliable, friendly, and incredibly talented. Pavil is easily one of the brightest people in the Pudgy Penguins and Abstract community. I’m an absolute fan of his work, his street art is museum quality, just incredible stuff. LayerZero, Abstract NFTs, and PP are some of my favorite artworks, and seeing how he elevates these spaces is inspiring. A true gem to any community. Big brother penguin. Massive respect, can’t wait for the next art drop.

data.subject: 0x0e3274FEa64567fdA14187c89B08f61048F4d45a
data.metadata: {"description":"Abschud is a bit like Leonidas in 300, the first Spartan soldier of Abstract. The Green Lantern. He watches over the essentials and oils the gears of the ecosystem. He brings things to light when needed and sends reminders when necessary.\nHe’s sort of the voice of reason among the Chads on Abstract. Patient and meticulous, he also enforces the rules while making sure to preserve a healthy atmosphere and good vibes."}

translation.translatedDescription:
Abschud is a bit like Leonidas in 300, the first Spartan soldier of Abstract. The Green Lantern. He watches over the essentials and oils the gears of the ecosystem. He brings things to light when needed and sends reminders when necessary.
He’s sort of the voice of reason among the Chads on Abstract. Patient and meticulous, he also enforces the rules while making sure to preserve a healthy atmosphere and good vibes.

data.author: 0xA270Bde2ecbD72aD259D02D7cCB47D2d95eF94eD

data.metadata:
{"description":"A reference in Discord security.
If you want to build a community, it necessarily starts with a SAFE Discord, and Jon is your guy.
He has secured most of the major Web3 Discords or audited their security.
A true well of knowledge in the field."}

translation.translatedDescription:
A reference in Discord security.
If you want to build a community, it necessarily starts with a SAFE Discord, and Jon is your guy.
He has secured most of the major Web3 Discords or audited their security.
A true well of knowledge in the field.
